childhood.familyBackground: Crabill grew up in Portland in a family with interests in finance and investments. His parents were involved in real estate and financial services.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 크라빌은 포틀랜드에서 금융 및 투자에 관심을 가진 가족에서 성장했다.
childhood.education: University of Oregon; University of Chicago Booth School of Business
childhood.educationKo: 오리건 대학교; 시카고 대학교 부스 경영대학원
childhood.earlyLife: Crabill worked in finance and became a hedge fund manager. He founded his own investment firm focusing on diversified financial strategies.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 크라빌은 금융에서 일했고 헤지펀드 관리자가 되었다.

careerTimeline.event: Worked in financial services and investment banking
careerTimeline.eventKo: 금융 서비스 및 투자 은행에서 근무

careerTimeline.event: Founded hedge fund with focus on diversified investment strategies
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다양한 투자 전략에 초점을 맞춘 헤지펀드 설립

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through successful fund management
careerTimeline.eventKo: 성공적인 펀드 관리를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Several fund positions faced volatility and underperformance during market turbulence
failures.descriptionKo: 시장 변동성 중 여러 펀드 포지션이 변동성 및 부진에 직면
failures.lesson: Hedge funds require disciplined risk management and diversification
failures.lessonKo: 헤지펀드는 규율 있는 위험 관리 및 다각화가 필요하다

quotes.text: Successful investing combines research, discipline, and long-term vision
quotes.textKo: 성공적인 투자는 연구, 규율 및 장기 비전을 결합한다

recommended.title: Market Wizards
recommended.author: Jack Schwager
recommended.note: Inspired his approach to quantitative investing and market analysis
recommended.noteKo: 정량적 투자 및 시장 분석에 대한 접근 방식을 영감을 줌

personalTraits.knownFor: Hedge fund management; diversified investment strategies; financial acumen
personalTraits.knownForKo: 헤지펀드 관리; 다양한 투자 전략; 금융 감각
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and financial literacy initiatives
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 교육 및 금융 문해력 이니셔티브 지원
